40:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Mnemosyne vs Letta (MemGPT)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"An honest, technical comparison for users running memory systems locally with Hermes Agent and OpenClaw."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Last updated:"}]," 2026-06-08 · Mnemosyne v3.7.0"]}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"TL;DR:"}]," Letta is a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"research-grade agent framework"}]," with OS-inspired virtual context management, self-editing memory, and a 42-table PostgreSQL schema. Mnemosyne is a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"lightweight memory layer"}]," with 3 SQLite tables, in-process operation, and near-zero infrastructure. Letta is what you deploy when context windows are the bottleneck; Mnemosyne is what you use when you want memory that just works without standing up a database cluster."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","hr",null,{}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Architecture"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Dimension"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta Self-Hosted"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Process model"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"In-process Python library"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Separate Docker containers (Letta server + PostgreSQL + pgvector)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"IPC overhead"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Zero (direct function calls)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"REST API + JSON serialization to Letta server"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Database"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite (single file, WAL mode)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"PostgreSQL + pgvector (42-table schema, Alembic migrations)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embedding model"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"fastembed ONNX -- BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 (~67MB)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Configurable -- OpenAI, HuggingFace, or local embedding endpoints"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec (int8/bit/float32) or numpy fallback"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"pgvector HNSW (mature, optimized)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cold start"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Instant (if models cached locally)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~10–30s (Docker container boot + PostgreSQL init + agent creation)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Runtime memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~10–20MB per session (SQLite + ONNX)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~200–500MB (PostgreSQL pool + Letta server + agent runtime)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Stars / community"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"New (v3.7.0)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~21.8K GitHub stars, active research community"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Pricing"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Free (MIT)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"OSS free (Letta Code), Cloud API usage-based ($0.00015/sec tool execution + LLM)"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","hr",null,{}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Memory Model"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Mnemosyne: BEAM (Bilevel Episodic-Associative Memory)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Three SQLite tables:"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tier"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Purpose"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Behavior"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hot, recent context"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-injected into prompts. TTL-based eviction (default 24h). Max 10,000 items. FTS5 indexed."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Long-term consolidated storage"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Populated by ","$L3"," consolidation. Hybrid vector + FTS5 search."]}]]}],"$L4"]}]]}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31","\n","$L32","\n","$L33","\n","$L34","\n","$L35","\n","$L36","\n","$L37","\n","$L38","\n","$L39","\n","$L3a","\n","$L3b","\n","$L3c"],["$L3d"],"$L3e"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zHG3ZR8juPPx4CXLmq1-_"}
3:["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]
4:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scratchpad"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporary agent workspace"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not searchable, not consolidated. Cleared explicitly. Max 1,000 items."}]]}]
5:["$","p",null,{"children":["Additional: ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," -- temporal knowledge graph with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," for point-in-time queries."]}]
6:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Core operations:"}]," ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," -- intentionally simple."]}]
7:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Letta: OS-Inspired Virtual Context Management"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"Letta models an agent's memory like an operating system, with two distinct tiers and active context paging:"}]
9:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tier"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta name"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"OS analogy"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Behavior"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Main context"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Core memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"RAM"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Fixed-size block injected into every LLM call. Agent self-edits via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"core_memory_append"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"core_memory_replace"}],". Limited to the model's context window."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"External context"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Archival memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Disk"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Unlimited long-term storage. Agent searches via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"archival_memory_insert"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"archival_memory_search"}],". Text + embedding pairs stored in pgvector."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Context paging"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"MemGPT paging"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Virtual memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When context fills up, Letta autonomously pages data between core and archival memory. The agent decides what to evict, what to keep, and when to fetch from \"disk.\""}]]}]]}]]}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Core operations:"}]," ",["$","code",null,{"children":"core_memory_append"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"core_memory_replace"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"archival_memory_insert"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"archival_memory_search"}]," -- the agent itself calls these as tool functions."]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key difference:"}]," Mnemosyne's ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," is an explicit consolidation step called by the developer. Letta's paging is autonomous -- the agent decides when and how to manage its own context, which is powerful but requires a capable frontier model to do well."]}]
c:["$","hr",null,{}]
d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Context Management: Letta's Defining Feature"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"This is where Letta is genuinely unique among memory systems. No other open-source memory layer provides OS-style virtual context paging with autonomous agent-driven memory management."}]
f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Self-editing memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["No -- ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," is developer-triggered, agent writes to memory via tools but cannot restructure its own memory layout"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Yes -- agent calls ",["$","code",null,{"children":"core_memory_replace"}]," to rewrite its own working context, ",["$","code",null,{"children":"archival_memory_insert"}]," to persist to long-term storage"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Context overflow handling"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["TTL-based eviction on working memory. Developer controls what stays via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"max_items"}],"."]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Autonomous paging: agent detects context is full, decides what to evict to archival, fetches relevant archival data back into core context as needed"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Unlimited context illusion"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No -- working memory is bounded. Episodic memory is searchable but not context-aware."}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Yes -- from the LLM's perspective, Letta agents appear to have unlimited context because they page data in and out autonomously"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Model requirements"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Works with any local or remote model"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Best results require GPT-4-class frontier models. Local models struggle with autonomous memory management."}]]}]]}]]}]
10:["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Honest assessment:"}]," Letta's virtual context management is impressive research (backed by the MemGPT paper). For workloads where context windows are the primary bottleneck -- long-form writing, research agents, multi-session conversations -- it solves a real problem. But it comes at a cost: complex infrastructure and expensive model requirements."]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","hr",null,{}]
12:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Retrieval"}]
13:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta Self-Hosted"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec (cosine distance)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"pgvector HNSW (via archival_memory_search)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Keyword search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite FTS5"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"PostgreSQL full-text (passage-based, embedded in archival_memory_search)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Graph search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TripleStore (subject-predicate-object, temporal)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No native knowledge graph"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]," params on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No native temporal search. Metadata filtering via tags but no time-based decay."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scoring formula"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight × vec + fts_weight × fts + importance_weight × importance"}],", then × recency decay"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Embedding cosine distance. Passage-based chunks returned with scores."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Default weights"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"50% vector, 30% FTS, 20% importance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Single-strategy (embedding similarity)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Configurable?"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Yes -- per-query ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}]," params"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Limited -- ",["$","code",null,{"children":"archival_memory_search"}]," accepts query + optional limit/offset"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Reranking"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None (single-pass)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None. Relies on embedding quality + LLM's own judgment when results enter core context."}]]}]]}]]}]
14:["$","hr",null,{}]
15:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Entity Extraction"}]
16:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Method"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Regex patterns + pure Python Levenshtein distance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM-driven (agent extracts entities as part of memory editing, no separate pipeline)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"@mentions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"#hashtags"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"quoted phrases\""}],", capitalized sequences (2–5 words)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No dedicated entity extraction. Entities live in core memory blocks as agent-managed structured text."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fuzzy matching"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Levenshtein distance with prefix/substring bonuses"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not applicable -- core_memory is agent-written, not automatically normalized"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Storage"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["TripleStore triples: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"(memory_id, \"mentions\", \"entity_name\")"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Stored as structured text in core memory blocks (e.g., \"User: Alice, Age: 30, Location: NY\")"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Speed"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~0.01ms per extraction"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"N/A -- entity tracking is agent-managed, not a pipeline"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Opt-in?"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"extract_entities=True"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Always on (agents maintain their own structured context)"}]]}]]}]]}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Verdict:"}]," Mnemosyne provides automatic entity extraction with fuzzy matching. Letta delegates entity tracking entirely to the agent -- it is more flexible (agents can structure memory however they want) but less reliable (depends on model quality and consistency)."]}]
18:["$","hr",null,{}]
19:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Fact Extraction"}]
1a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Method"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM-driven: sends text to LLM, parses 2–5 factual statements"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM-driven via core_memory editing. Agents decide what is fact-worthy and restructure their own context blocks."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fallback chain"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Remote OpenAI-compatible API → local ctransformers GGUF → skip (graceful)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No fallback chain. Relies on the configured LLM provider."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Storage"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["TripleStore: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"(memory_id, \"fact\", fact_text)"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Stored in core memory blocks as agent-edited structured text. Not separately queryable."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Opt-in?"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"extract=True"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Always on (agent-managed). No separate fact pipeline."}]]}]]}]]}]
1b:["$","hr",null,{}]
1c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Integrations"}]
1d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"MCP (Model Context Protocol)"}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne provides an MCP server with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"25 tools"}]," and ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"2 transports"}],":"]}]
1f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tool"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Store a memory (supports entity extraction, fact extraction, bank selection)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_recall"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Search memories with hybrid scoring and configurable weights"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run consolidation cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_scratchpad_read"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Read agent scratchpad"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_scratchpad_write"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Write to scratchpad"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_stats"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get memory statistics"}]]}]]}]]}]
20:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne mcp                          # stdio transport (Claude Desktop, etc.)\nmnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080  # SSE transport (web clients)\nmnemosyne mcp --bank project_a            # scoped to a specific bank\n"}]}]
21:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Letta Integration"}]
22:["$","p",null,{"children":["Letta provides a REST API and Python SDK (",["$","code",null,{"children":"letta-client"}],"). Agents are created server-side and communicate via the API. The agent itself handles memory -- external tools access core/archival memory through the agent's tool interface."]}]
23:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Native (in-process, no serialization)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"REST API client to Letta server"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"OpenClaw"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Planned (adapter not yet built)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"REST API client (custom integration required)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"MCP"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"25 tools, stdio + SSE"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not MCP-native. Tool calls happen server-side inside the agent."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cross-machine"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Export/import JSON only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"REST API -- any machine with HTTP access to the Letta server"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python SDK"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne"}]," (direct import)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install letta-client"}]," → REST client to remote server"]}]]}]]}]]}]
24:["$","hr",null,{}]
25:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Memory Banks"}]
26:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Named banks"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"BankManager"}]," -- create, list, delete, rename banks"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agents as isolation units. Each agent has its own core + archival memory."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Isolation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Per-bank SQLite file under ",["$","code",null,{"children":"data_dir/banks/<name>/"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Per-agent PostgreSQL rows. Core memory blocks and archival passages are scoped to the agent."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Usage"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne(bank=\"work\")"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne mcp --bank work"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Create a new agent per project/user. No \"bank\" concept -- agents are the isolation boundary."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multi-tenancy"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No access control"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Cloud API provides organization-level isolation. Self-hosted: agent-level isolation only."}]]}]]}]]}]
27:["$","hr",null,{}]
28:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Additional Features"}]
29:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Mnemosyne-specific (not in Letta)"}]
2a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Module"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Streaming"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/streaming.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]," with push (callbacks) and pull (iterator) patterns. Thread-safe event buffer."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Delta sync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/streaming.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]," -- incremental synchronization between Mnemosyne instances with checkpointed resume."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Pattern detection"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/patterns.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]," -- temporal (hour/weekday), content (keyword frequency, co-occurrence), sequence patterns."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Memory compression"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/patterns.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryCompressor"}]," -- dictionary-based, RLE, and semantic compression strategies."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Plugin system"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/plugins.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"MnemosynePlugin"}]," base class with 4 lifecycle hooks. Discovers plugins from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],"."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Diagnostics"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"diagnose.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"PII-safe health check -- dependencies, database state, vector readiness. No memory content or API keys."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal knowledge graph"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Subject-predicate-object triples with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," for point-in-time queries."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hybrid retrieval"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Three-signal hybrid (vector + FTS5 + importance) with configurable weights and recency decay."}]]}]]}]]}]
2b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Letta-specific (not in Mnemosyne)"}]
2c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Virtual context paging"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"OS-inspired memory management: agents autonomously page data between core (RAM) and archival (disk) memory. Unique among open-source memory systems."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Self-editing memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Agents call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"core_memory_append"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"core_memory_replace"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"archival_memory_insert"}]," as tool functions -- they restructure their own memory layout at runtime."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Research pedigree"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Backed by the MemGPT paper (UC Berkeley). Published at NeurIPS 2023 workshops. Active academic interest and citations."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent templates"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Pre-built agent types for different use cases (MemGPT, MemGPT+extras, custom). Each template defines base personality, memory blocks, and tool set."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multi-agent orchestration"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Letta server manages multiple agents simultaneously. Agents can be composed into pipelines."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cloud API"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hosted Letta with managed infrastructure. Pay-as-you-go pricing. No PostgreSQL to manage."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Human-in-the-loop"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agents can pause and request human input mid-conversation. Useful for approval workflows."}]]}]]}]]}]
2d:["$","hr",null,{}]
2e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Performance Characteristics"}]
2f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Metric"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Letta Self-Hosted"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recall latency (10K corpus)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~2–10ms -- in-process SQLite + sqlite-vec, no HTTP overhead"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50–300ms -- REST API round-trip + PostgreSQL + pgvector"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"IPC model"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Direct Python function call"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"REST API to Letta server → JSON serialization → agent-side tool execution"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Storage footprint"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50–100MB SQLite file per 10K memories"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~500MB–1GB PostgreSQL + pgvector index per agent (42 tables, dense schema)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Model download"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"One-time ~67MB (fastembed ONNX)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None required locally (embeddings via API), or variable (HuggingFace models if self-hosting embeddings)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Runtime memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~10–20MB per session"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~200–500MB (PostgreSQL pool + Letta server + per-agent context)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"LLM calls per operation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0–1 (recall is local; fact extraction calls LLM once)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1+ per tool call (agent may chain multiple memory operations in a single turn)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Startup time"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Instant"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~10–30s (Docker + PostgreSQL + agent creation)"}]]}]]}]]}]
30:["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Important caveat:"}]," Letta's latency is higher per operation because the agent reasons about memory management. This is a feature, not a bug -- the agent decides ",["$","em",null,{"children":"what"}]," to store, ",["$","em",null,{"children":"how"}]," to structure it, and ",["$","em",null,{"children":"when"}]," to page data. Mnemosyne's operations are deterministic and fast by design, but they do not adapt to context the way Letta's agents do."]}],"\n"]}]
31:["$","hr",null,{}]
32:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"When to Choose What"}]
33:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Choose Mnemosyne if:"}]
34:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["You want ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," with zero containers and no PostgreSQL"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need the fastest possible recall latency for interactive agent loops"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You're running on a resource-constrained environment (VPS, ephemeral VM, CI)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You're building a single-user, single-machine agent (Hermes, Claude Desktop, etc.)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want an MCP-compatible memory layer (stdio + SSE)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want deterministic, predictable memory behavior without autonomous agent decisions"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want hybrid retrieval (vector + keyword + importance) with configurable weights"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want memory banks with per-bank SQLite isolation without standing up PostgreSQL"}],"\n"]}]
35:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Choose Letta if:"}]
36:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Context windows are your primary bottleneck and you need agents that handle arbitrarily long conversations"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want agents that autonomously manage their own memory (self-editing, context paging)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need multi-agent orchestration with a single server managing multiple agent instances"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You are building research prototypes or experimenting with OS-inspired agent architectures"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You are comfortable with Docker + PostgreSQL + pgvector as infrastructure requirements"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You have budget for frontier models (GPT-4 class) that can reliably manage autonomous memory"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want pre-built agent templates with defined personalities and memory structures"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need a hosted cloud option (Letta Cloud API) to avoid managing infrastructure"}],"\n"]}]
37:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Neither is \"better.\" They solve fundamentally different problems. Letta addresses the context window bottleneck with autonomous memory management. Mnemosyne provides fast, deterministic, low-infrastructure memory. Choose based on whether you need an agent that manages its own memory, or a memory layer that your agent controls directly."}]
38:["$","hr",null,{}]
39:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Known Gaps in Mnemosyne (honest list)"}]
3a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Gap"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Severity"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Workaround"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No autonomous context paging"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low for short sessions, high for long-form agents"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," does explicit consolidation. For long conversations, call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," periodically or use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"max_items"}]," limits carefully."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No self-editing memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Agent writes to memory via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_write()"}]," -- but cannot restructure existing memory blocks. Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"invalidate()"}]," + re-write for restructuring."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No multi-agent orchestration"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low for single-agent setups, medium for multi-agent"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run multiple Mnemosyne instances with per-agent banks. No built-in agent-to-agent communication."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No cross-machine network API"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium for multi-machine setups"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Export/import JSON; same-machine sharing via shared SQLite file"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No cross-encoder reranking"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low for most queries"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hybrid scoring with configurable weights covers common cases"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No automatic conflict detection"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Manual ",["$","code",null,{"children":"invalidate(memory_id, replacement_id=new_id)"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No multi-tenancy / access control"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"High for SaaS use cases"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Use per-bank SQLite isolation for domain separation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No pre-built agent templates / personalities"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agents using Mnemosyne handle personality in their own system prompt -- memory is just the storage layer"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No cloud-hosted option"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low for self-hosted users"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is designed for local/self-hosted use. No plans for a hosted service."}]]}]]}]]}]
3b:["$","hr",null,{}]
3c:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","em",null,{"children":"Every feature listed for Mnemosyne has been verified against the v3.7.0 source code. Letta features are based on the open-source repository and documentation as of May 2026. If anything here is wrong, please open an issue -- we'll fix it."}]}]
3d:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js","async":true}]
3e:["$","$L3f",null,{"children":["$","$40",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@41"}]}]
41:null
